channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump is cashing in on the presidency like no president ever has
item.description: Never in 250 years has America witnessed a sitting president shield himself and his family from tax scrutiny, after leveraging policies that benefit h...

item.title: DNC Chair Ken Martin Faces Calls to Resign After 2024 Autopsy
item.description: Democratic National Committee chair Ken Martin is facing anger and resignation calls from congressional Democrats after the release of the 2024 election autopsy.

item.title: Trump's Revenge Politics Backfires
item.description: President Trump's week began with victories against Republican rivals but ended in a rare moment of Republican discontent.

item.title: Trump Administration Intensifies Citizenship Revocation Efforts
item.description: The Trump administration is temporarily reassigning immigration lawyers to the Justice Department to accelerate the process of stripping citizenship from naturalized individuals.
